proof: function[T0, T1, T4](x0: T0, x1: Sum[T0, T1], x2: T0 -> T4, x3: T1 -> T4) { Sum.inl[T0, T1](x0) != x1 or sum_cases[T0, T1, T4](x1, x2, x3) = x2(x0) }[T, U, V](x, Sum.inl[T, U](x), left, right)
function[T0, T1, T4](x0: T1, x1: Sum[T0, T1], x2: T0 -> T4, x3: T1 -> T4) { Sum.inr[T0, T1](x0) != x1 or sum_cases[T0, T1, T4](x1, x2, x3) = x3(x0) }[T, U, V](y, Sum.inr[T, U](y), left, right)

function[T0, T1, T4, T5](x0: T0, x1: Sum[T0, T1], x2: T0 -> T4, x3: T1 -> T5) { Sum.inl[T0, T1](x0) != x1 or sum_map[T0, T1, T4, T5](x1, x2, x3) = Sum.inl[T4, T5](x2(x0)) }[T, U, V, W](x, Sum.inl[T, U](x), left, right)

function[T0, T1, T4, T5](x0: T1, x1: Sum[T0, T1], x2: T0 -> T4, x3: T1 -> T5) { Sum.inr[T0, T1](x0) != x1 or sum_map[T0, T1, T4, T5](x1, x2, x3) = Sum.inr[T4, T5](x3(x0)) }[T, U, V, W](y, Sum.inr[T, U](y), left, right)
function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: T0, x1: T0 -> T2, x2: T1 -> T3) { sum_map[T0, T1, T2, T3](Sum.inl[T0, T1](x0), x1, x2) = Sum.inl[T2, T3](x1(x0)) }[T, U, V, U](x, left, identity_fn[U])
function[T0, T1, T2](x0: Sum[T0, T1], x1: T0 -> T2) { sum_map[T0, T1, T2, T1](x0, x1, identity_fn[T1]) = sum_map_left[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1) }[T, U, V](Sum.inl[T, U](x), left)
function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: T1, x1: T0 -> T2, x2: T1 -> T3) { sum_map[T0, T1, T2, T3](Sum.inr[T0, T1](x0), x1, x2) = Sum.inr[T2, T3](x2(x0)) }[T, U, V, U](y, left, identity_fn[U])
function[T0, T1, T2](x0: Sum[T0, T1], x1: T0 -> T2) { sum_map[T0, T1, T2, T1](x0, x1, identity_fn[T1]) = sum_map_left[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1) }[T, U, V](Sum.inr[T, U](y), left)
function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: T0, x1: T0 -> T2, x2: T1 -> T3) { sum_map[T0, T1, T2, T3](Sum.inl[T0, T1](x0), x1, x2) = Sum.inl[T2, T3](x1(x0)) }[T, U, T, W](x, identity_fn[T], right)
function[T0, T1, T2](x0: Sum[T0, T1]) { sum_map[T0, T1, T0, T2](x0, identity_fn[T0]) = sum_map_right[T0, T1, T2](x0) }[T, U, W](Sum.inl[T, U](x))
function[T0, T1, T2, T3](x0: T1, x1: T0 -> T2, x2: T1 -> T3) { sum_map[T0, T1, T2, T3](Sum.inr[T0, T1](x0), x1, x2) = Sum.inr[T2, T3](x2(x0)) }[T, U, T, W](y, identity_fn[T], right)
function[T0, T1, T2](x0: Sum[T0, T1], x1: T1 -> T2) { sum_map[T0, T1, T0, T2](x0, identity_fn[T0], x1) = sum_map_right[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1) }[T, U, W](Sum.inr[T, U](y), right)
function[T0, T1](x0: T0, x1: Sum[T0, T1]) { Sum.inl[T0, T1](x0) != x1 or sum_swap[T0, T1](x1) = Sum.inr[T1, T0](x0) }[T, U](x, Sum.inl[T, U](x))
function[T0, T1](x0: T1, x1: Sum[T0, T1]) { Sum.inr[T0, T1](x0) != x1 or sum_swap[T0, T1](x1) = Sum.inl[T1, T0](x0) }[T, U](y, Sum.inr[T, U](y))
